% Policy/rule numbers reused from the E6 scale-transfer campaign.
\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenN}{2}\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenNTxt}{2}  % 10x25 N: smallest budget (s) at which credited CP-SAT reaches the policy; 0/"not by" = never within measured ladder
\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenL}{1}\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenLTxt}{1}  % 10x25 L: smallest budget (s) at which credited CP-SAT reaches the policy; 0/"not by" = never within measured ladder
\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenS}{30}\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenSTxt}{30}  % 10x25 S: smallest budget (s) at which credited CP-SAT reaches the policy; 0/"not by" = never within measured ladder

\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenLW}{1}\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenLWTxt}{1}  % 10x25 LW: smallest budget (s) at which credited CP-SAT reaches the policy; 0/"not by" = never within measured ladder
\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenSW}{30}\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenSWTxt}{30}  % 10x25 SW: smallest budget (s) at which credited CP-SAT reaches the policy; 0/"not by" = never within measured ladder
\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenLSW}{30}\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTenLSWTxt}{30}  % 10x25 LSW: smallest budget (s) at which credited CP-SAT reaches the policy; 0/"not by" = never within measured ladder
\newcommand{\ScaleTenMaxRung}{30}\newcommand{\ScaleTenNBeyondThirty}{0}\newcommand{\ScaleTenNCrossedByMax}{8}  % 10x25: rungs to 30s; regimes not crossed by 30s; regimes crossed by 30s (of 8)
\newcommand{\ScaleTenAllCrossTxt}{30}  % 10x25: smallest budget by which ALL 8 regimes are crossed, or "not by" the largest rung
\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTwentyN}{0}\newcommand{\ScaleCrossTwentyNTxt}{not by 60}  % 20x25 N: smallest budget (s) at which credited CP-SAT reaches the policy; 0/"not by" = never within measured ladder
